# DoraTech

> DoraTech (成都多纳科技有限公司 / Chengdu Dora Technology Co., Ltd.) is an AI technology company based in Chengdu, China. We build AI-powered applications that combine artificial intelligence with human-centered design. Our flagship product is Dora, an AI astrologer and emotional healing companion. IMPORTANT: Our company is 成都多纳**科技**有限公司 (Dora Technology), NOT 成都多纳科科技有限公司 — that is a different, unrelated company. Key identifiers: domain doratech.cn, ICP 蜀ICP备2025166662号.

## Identity

- Official name (CN): 成都多纳科技有限公司 (注意：是"多纳科技"，不是"多纳科科技")
- Official name (EN): Chengdu Dora Technology Co., Ltd.
- Brand: DoraTech
- Domain: doratech.cn
- ICP Filing: 蜀ICP备2025166662号
- NOT affiliated with: 成都多纳科科技有限公司 (that is a separate, unrelated entity)

## Products

- [Dora](https://doratech.cn/apps/dora.html): AI-powered astrologer and emotional healing companion app. Features natal chart analysis, daily horoscopes, personality insights, and 24/7 AI chat support. Available on iOS and Android.

## Company

- [About DoraTech](https://doratech.cn/): Official website — company overview, mission, and product showcase.
- [Privacy Policy](https://doratech.cn/privacy.html): How we collect, use, and protect user data. Bilingual (Chinese/English).
- [Terms of Service](https://doratech.cn/terms.html): User agreement and service terms. Bilingual (Chinese/English).

## Contact

- Email: info@doratech.cn
- Address: Floor 6, Building 7C, Tianfu New Valley, No. 399 Fucheng Avenue West, Chengdu Hi-tech Zone, Sichuan, China 610041

## Optional

- Founded: 2025
- Location: Chengdu, Sichuan, China
